payload.title: Hapa Character Sheet board initialized
payload.body: Seed board for a Hapa-standard resume, RPG stat sheet, skill codex, portfolio, media, lineage, and agent dossier node.

payload.title: Review Hapa environment and source truth
payload.description: Review the Hapa front door, protocol standards, Second Brain, wiki, Quest Keeper, and Overwatch Kanban before designing the node.
acceptance: Hapa roots identified
Second Brain counts captured
Kanban model reviewed

payload.title: Define product contract and information architecture
payload.description: Define resume, character sheet, skill codex, portfolio, lineage, media, agent dossier, protocols, and backstage modes.
acceptance: Primary modes defined
Audience tiers defined
Acceptance criteria written

payload.title: Implement Character Sheet projection schema
payload.description: Create app-owned profile, section, stat snapshot, pin, privacy rule, and export manifest tables over Second Brain projections.
acceptance: Projection schema has migrations
Fields map to Second Brain tables/views
Fixture data covers public, trusted, agent, owner visibility

payload.title: Build read-only Second Brain adapter
payload.description: Read skills, evidence, turns, lineage, nodes, agents, media assets, and protocol articles from Second Brain without mutating raw memory.
acceptance: Adapter supports direct SQLite and API modes
Queries are read-only by default
Source counts and freshness are included

payload.title: Implement visibility and redaction gates
payload.description: Add public, trusted, agent, and owner visibility tiers with field-level redaction and public-claim pinning.
acceptance: Public exports exclude private raw history by default
Agent dossier is structured and redacted
Owner can inspect export manifest before publish

payload.title: Build RPG/professional stat engine
payload.description: Compute Systems, Craft, Signal, Forge, Lore, Stewardship, Tempo, and Communion stats from evidence counts, source diversity, result links, freshness, and confidence.
acceptance: Formula version recorded
Each stat explains source counts and confidence
Ranks map to D/C/B/A/S/SS bands

payload.title: Implement API and CLI parity spine
payload.description: Create health, capabilities, sheet, resume, stats, skills, evidence, portfolio, lineage, agent-dossier, refresh, export, and smoke surfaces over shared functions.
acceptance: API and CLI share projection functions
CLI prints JSON by default
smoke --dry-run returns deterministic report

payload.title: Build multi-menu web UI
payload.description: Build the Sheet, Resume, Skills, Portfolio, Lineage, Media, Agents, Protocols, and Backstage menus in the Hapa/Astros RPG operator aesthetic.
acceptance: First screen is the usable sheet
Menus are keyboard accessible
Text fits on mobile and desktop
Public and owner visibility states are distinct

payload.title: Create resume and portfolio exports
payload.description: Generate Markdown, JSON, HTML brochure, and later PDF exports from pinned reviewed claims and selected media.
acceptance: Exports include provenance manifest
Markdown and JSON work first
Public export honors redaction rules

payload.title: Build lineage graph and evidence filters
payload.description: Show source exposure to AI turn to result to node skill to protocol chains with confidence and source-type separation.
acceptance: Lineage separates learning, result, and derived wisdom
Weak/inferred routes are labeled
Agent API can filter by skill, result, source, and confidence

payload.title: Build media and avatar gallery
payload.description: Expose pinned images, videos, screenshots, songs, avatar variants, protocol cards, and portfolio media with visibility-aware captions.
acceptance: Media records link to source metadata
Public captions are reviewed
Owner can queue missing sheet/skill media

payload.title: Create Electron desktop shell and launcher
payload.description: Wrap the same web UI/API in an Electron desktop shell with safe preload actions for local files, export folders, and board links.
acceptance: Desktop starts local loopback server
Node integration remains off
Launcher and docs are created

payload.title: Register protocol flow and Hapa docs
payload.description: Promote the design into a wiki flow explainer, Node Space sidecar, process-flow registry entry, README, AGENTS, API, CLI, and protocol parity docs.
acceptance: Human accepts design direction
Wiki flow explainer is created
Node Space JSON sidecar is registered
Quest Keeper can discover the board

payload.title: Design pack checkpoint
payload.summary: Seed board contains 13 tracked tasks across discovery, product, data, safety, stats, parity, UI, exports, lineage, media, desktop, and protocol registration.
verified: Environment reviewed
Design spec created
Manifest, API draft, flow sidecar, board config, board events, and prototype mock drafted

payload.title: Fill prototype with comprehensive Second Brain projection
payload.description: Replace sample-only prototype content with data-driven resume, stats, skills, nodes, capabilities, lineage, sources, media, agents, protocols, and Kanban layers backed by the Hapa Second Brain projection.
acceptance: Projection includes first-class skills, nodes, node skills, topics, turns, media jobs, agents, harnesses, protocol docs, and board state
UI has search, family, rank, type, mode, sort, and abstraction controls
Desktop and mobile screenshots render without obvious clipping

payload.title: Generate high-production game-view visual mocks
payload.description: Create a second human-facing Character Mode direction that preserves the proof/operator view but reframes the same data as a premium RPG character sheet, skill codex, evidence map, and mobile passport.
acceptance: Four visual directions generated from current screenshot references
Mocks copied into outputs
Direction note explains how to synthesize the views into a second route

payload.title: Implement Presentation view mode over the data-backed prototype
payload.description: Keep the existing interface as Backend/Admin/Data view and add a second game-style Presentation view with Hero Detail, Skill Codex, Proof Map, Loadout, and Passport panels using the same projection data.
acceptance: Data View remains available at the normal prototype URL
Presentation View opens through hash routes and mode switch
Presentation panels use live projection counts, skills, nodes, agents, protocols, and media
Desktop and mobile render checks are captured

payload.title: Add animation and sound production-value layer
payload.description: Use Hapa/Astros and game UI patterns to make Presentation view feel alive with panel wake-in, sweep lines, portrait drift, stat charge bars, rank glint, proof-chain stagger, graph pulses, skill-tree pulses, inventory glow, hover lift, focus rings, and opt-in persisted WebAudio SFX.
acceptance: Motion is concentrated on meaningful state and game-object feedback
SFX is off by default and persisted when enabled
Reduced-motion media query disables nonessential animation
Desktop and mobile render checks still fit

payload.title: Add Passport click-to-inspect drilldown
payload.description: Make Passport metrics, core attributes, featured skills, proof-trail steps, and portfolio nodes selectable. Each selection shows a description, the next aggregation lower, and examples pulled from live Hapa projection data.
acceptance: Passport chips and rows have selected states
Detail panel explains the selected thing
Detail panel shows next-lower aggregation
Detail panel shows concrete examples
Selection can persist through focus hash routes

payload.title: Upgrade Skill Codex with media thumbnails and full inventories
payload.description: Add GPT Image skill-family thumbnails, selectable radial family branches, capability and node inspector state, bounded evidence tag containers, and grouped all-skills/all-Hapa-nodes inventories in Presentation view.
acceptance: Each radial skill family displays media thumbnail art
Clicking families, capabilities, skills, or nodes updates the selected capability inspector
Green success-signal tags wrap or scroll inside the inspector container
All indexed skills and all indexed Hapa nodes are grouped and represented with media tiles

payload.title: Link Avatar Dashboard and Asset Viewer image sources
payload.description: Project Hapa Avatar Dashboard, Hapa Asset Viewer, Character Sheet, and Media Registry image candidates into the Character Sheet and add a Presentation Hero image picker that swaps the character portrait/passport/resume image locally.
acceptance: Hero view links to the Hapa Avatar Dashboard and Hapa Asset Viewer surfaces
Character Sheet exposes indexed avatar, asset-viewer, media, and sheet image sources
Selecting a source updates the hero portrait, passport hero, and resume avatar panel
Custom file and URL selections work without mutating source apps
Selected image persists locally when possible

payload.title: Add animated stat glyphs and skill thumbnails
payload.description: Upgrade Hero Detail stats and Skill Highlights with animated Hapa/Astros HUD glyphs, Skill Codex family thumbnails, glow/sweep motion, and hover/SFX participation without changing the data model.
acceptance: Eight core stats display distinct animated glyphs
Skill Highlights display animated family thumbnail media
Motion respects the existing reduced-motion policy
Rows keep stable dimensions and do not shift layout
Hero screenshot and browser checks pass

payload.title: Beef up Proof Map into explorable evidence constellation
payload.description: Replace the static proof constellation with a selectable animated proof graph, flowing edges, layer list, inspector drilldown, proof-flow chain, and comprehensive lower summary panels for sources, turns, skills, nodes, capabilities, media, agents, and protocols.
acceptance: Graph nodes are selectable and update the inspector
Selected proof layer is highlighted across graph, layer list, and flow chain
Inspector shows description, facts, lower aggregations, and examples
Comprehensive panels summarize major proof layers
Animation is restrained and respects reduced-motion policy
Browser validation and screenshot pass

payload.title: Expand Loadout equipped nodes into all-known node armory
payload.description: Replace the 12-card Equipped Hapa Nodes sample with a full selectable armory of every indexed Hapa node, type filters, generated animated node thumbnails, score meters, selected-node inspector, linked capabilities, related media, and source-path proof.
acceptance: All indexed Hapa nodes appear in the Loadout inventory
Every node card has a generated type-aware thumbnail/icon
Node type filters show complete known-node subsets
Selecting a node updates the inspector and URL hash
Inspector shows node facts, linked capabilities, related media, and source path
Browser validation and screenshot pass

payload.title: Next phase: Timeline View lore/canon rail
payload.description: Review the Second Brain timeline feature and plan a stylized Character Sheet Timeline View that tracks knowledge acquired, AI turns, skill consolidation, capability additions, Hapa node creation, media/protocol beats, and proof-backed character lore over historical time.
acceptance: Review Second Brain timeline protocol, UI, API, tables, and live DB scope
Add Character Sheet timeline phase brief with source mappings and design direction
Define route, projection keys, eras, beats, layer filters, and inspector behavior
Specify API and CLI additions for timeline projections
Track turns, knowledge acquired, skills, capabilities, node creation, and media/protocol beats over time
Default view reads as character lore/canon while Proof/Raw modes expose timeline provenance

payload.title: Timeline View lore/canon rail implemented
payload.description: Implemented the Character Sheet Timeline presentation route with Second Brain timeline projection, lore era gates, layer filters, selectable canon beats, historical activity series, source panels, and proof-backed canon inspector.
verified: Projection imports timeline events, activity metrics, synthesized skill unlocks, Hapa node creation, and capability additions
Route #presentation-timeline renders the Timeline tab in Character Mode
Clicking era, layer, and beat controls updates selection and hash state
Desktop screenshot and browser interaction checks passed
Board, README, and phase brief updated

payload.title: Projection schema implemented
payload.description: Added app-owned profile, section, stat snapshot, pin, privacy rule, and export manifest migration plus visibility fixtures mapped over the Second Brain projection.
verified: Schema migration exists
Fields map to profile, stats, pins, privacy, and export manifest responsibilities
Visibility fixture covers public, trusted, agent, and owner tiers

payload.title: Read-only Second Brain adapter implemented
payload.description: Shared runtime supports file, sqlite regeneration, and API adapter modes while the generator reads Second Brain tables without mutating raw memory.
verified: Direct SQLite mode regenerates from the builder
API mode loads a running Character Sheet endpoint
Source counts and freshness are available through health --deep

payload.title: Visibility and redaction gates implemented
payload.description: Added public, trusted, agent, and owner visibility tiers with local path scrubbing, public raw-history limiting, and export provenance manifests.
verified: Public sheet scan has zero /Users or file:///Users path hits
Agent/public modes redact local absolute paths
Exports include sidecar redaction manifests

payload.title: RPG/professional stat engine implemented
payload.description: Stats are computed and exposed as Systems, Craft, Signal, Forge, Lore, Stewardship, Tempo, and Communion with formula version, evidence counts, ranks, and explanations.
verified: Formula version hcs-stat-engine/2026-06-01 is exposed
CLI/API stats return eight stats
Presentation Hero renders animated stat cards from the projection

payload.title: API and CLI parity spine implemented
payload.description: Added shared stdlib runtime, CLI, and loopback API surfaces for health, capabilities, sheet, resume, stats, skills, skill evidence, portfolio, lineage, timeline, agent dossier, refresh, export, kanban, smoke, and serve.
verified: CLI smoke returns ok true
API health, stats, timeline, and markdown export endpoints respond
OpenAPI includes timeline and parity surfaces

payload.title: Multi-menu web UI implemented
payload.description: Data/Admin view and Presentation view now cover Hero Detail, Skill Codex, Proof Map, Loadout, Timeline, and Passport over the same projection data.
verified: First screen is usable sheet/prototype, not a marketing landing page
Presentation tabs render game-style views
Browser interaction checks passed for timeline and prior presentation panels

payload.title: Resume and portfolio exports implemented
payload.description: Added Markdown, JSON, and HTML resume export commands with public visibility redaction and sidecar provenance manifests.
verified: Markdown export generated
JSON export generated
HTML export generated
Each export includes a manifest

payload.title: Lineage graph and evidence filters implemented
payload.description: Proof Map and runtime lineage surfaces separate learning links, turns, capabilities, nodes, media, agents, and protocols with selectable proof layers and filters.
verified: Proof Map graph nodes and layers are inspectable
CLI lineage filters by skill
Agent/API lineage payload exposes lower proof examples

payload.title: Media and avatar gallery implemented
payload.description: Hero image picker, Loadout media proof, image source projection, and portfolio runtime expose avatar, asset, media, node, and generated-card artifacts with source metadata.
verified: 367 image sources indexed
1,055 media jobs exposed
Portfolio CLI/API returns nodes, media, and image sources

payload.title: Desktop shell and launcher implemented
payload.description: Added Electron shell scaffold with nodeIntegration off, contextIsolation on, sandbox on, local Python API startup, and a Mac launcher that opens the prototype.
verified: Desktop shell uses safe BrowserWindow defaults
Launcher command starts loopback API and opens prototype
Desktop README documents npm start flow

payload.title: Protocol flow and Hapa docs registered locally
payload.description: Registered the node manifest, API contract, process-flow sidecar, board config, event log, runtime docs, and Quest Keeper discovery note for owner review and local use.
verified: Manifest status is runtime_ready
Protocol registration doc exists
Node Space sidecar and Overwatch board config exist
User direction in this thread supplies the local implementation acceptance gate

payload.title: Add looping video Character Model showcase
payload.description: Add Calder-character-video-loop.mp4 as a local Character Model asset in the Presentation Hero view, with looping muted autoplay video stage, game HUD overlays, poster fallback, model metadata panel, image-source picker integration, and runtime projection parity.
acceptance: MP4 copied into outputs/assets for local-first use
Poster frame generated for fallback and image-source picker
Hero Detail renders a video character model stage
Projection exposes character_models and summary count
Runtime portfolio and agent dossier include character model data
Static validation and CLI smoke pass

payload.title: Add looping Skill Codex video previews
payload.description: Add r-kick-skill, r-run, and r-walk MP4s as local Skill Codex preview loops, place the loop stage at the center of the radial skill view, and switch the loop when families, skills, capabilities, or linked nodes are selected.
acceptance: MP4s copied into outputs/assets for local-first use
Poster frames generated for fallback previews
Skill Codex center stage renders a muted looping video preview
Clicks on skill rows select the skill instead of falling through to family defaults
Families, capabilities, nodes, and skills resolve to one of the three loop examples for now
Projection exposes skill_video_loops and summary count
Runtime portfolio and agent dossier include skill loop data
Static validation and CLI smoke pass

payload.title: Embed mini Hapa Second Brain console in Hero Detail
payload.description: Fill the Hero Detail center-lane blank space with a simplified Second Brain cockpit showing source intake, memory radar, topic bloom, canon timeline layers, and core graph counts from the live Character Sheet projection.
acceptance: Hero Detail includes a compact Second Brain mini-console below the proof chain
Console uses live source systems, topic profiles, timeline layers, and graph summary counts
Layout fills the center blank space without covering the character model or side panels
Responsive rules collapse the console cleanly on smaller screens
Manifest and README describe the new presentation capability
Static validation and CLI smoke pass

payload.title: Add proof-chain unit labels to Hero Detail
payload.description: Add compact unit labels under the Read, Learn, Practice, Build, Prove, and Publish counts so the Hero Detail proof chain reads as typed telemetry instead of bare numbers.
acceptance: Read shows source items
Learn shows skills
Practice shows AI turns
Build shows Hapa nodes
Prove shows evidence XP
Publish shows media jobs
Labels fit inside the proof-chain chips on desktop and collapse with existing responsive rules
Static validation and CLI smoke pass

payload.title: Create Character Sheet data refresh protocol
payload.description: Add a durable refresh protocol for future agents to rebuild Character Sheet skills, metrics, nodes, media, timeline, and agent data from Hapa Second Brain while recording the last successful refresh in an append-only ledger and projection metadata.
acceptance: Refresh protocol document exists
Node Space refresh flow sidecar exists
CLI refresh appends started and completed or failed events
Generated projection exposes refresh.last_success and summary.last_refresh_at
health --deep exposes refresh state
API POST refresh dry-run is available
README, runtime docs, manifest, and protocol registration reference the refresh protocol
Static validation and CLI smoke pass

payload.title: Add Skill Quality and Avatar Experience ranking enrichment
payload.description: Rank each skill's relative quality and each avatar's relative experience with skills, then expose the enrichment through Character Sheet data, Hero/Codex UI graphs, CLI/API surfaces, agent dossier, refresh protocol, and a durable flow sidecar.
acceptance: Projection includes skill_quality with skill ranks, family rollups, avatar profiles, and avatar-skill pairs
Hero Detail shows a compact rank-engine preview
Skill Codex shows a Skill Quality / Avatar Experience matrix
CLI skill-quality command filters by avatar, skill, family, and limit
API exposes GET /v1/character-sheets/calder/skill-quality
Agent dossier includes compact ranking context
Refresh protocol states rankings are reassessed on each refresh
Skill ranking protocol and flow sidecar exist
Static validation and CLI smoke pass

payload.title: Embed Skill Quality and Avatar Experience into Character UI
payload.description: Move the rank enrichment from a Codex-only analysis layer into the Hero Detail character card with a live model HUD badge, rank seal, quality/experience meters, pair counts, and clickable top-skill rows.
acceptance: Character model HUD displays live Q/EXP band
Character card includes rank engine console below identity strip
Console shows skill count, avatar count, pair count, top quality score, and top avatar EXP
Top skill rows are clickable and use existing Codex selection behavior
Responsive rules keep the console from overlapping the model video
Static validation and CLI smoke pass

payload.title: Add Daily Timeline abstraction to Second Brain and Character Sheet
payload.description: Expose day-level timeline buckets from Hapa Second Brain and project them into the Character Sheet Timeline view as a switchable Daily Recon layer with CLI/API parity, protocol docs, and refresh rules.
acceptance: Second Brain timeline payload exposes daily summary from time_bucket_day
Character Sheet data includes timeline.series_by_scale.day and timeline.daily_summary
Presentation Timeline includes Daily/Weekly/Monthly/Yearly scale controls and Daily Recon panel
CLI timeline command passes --scale day into the runtime projection
API timeline endpoint accepts scale=day
OpenAPI, runtime docs, README, refresh protocol, and daily timeline protocol are updated
Static validation and CLI smoke pass

payload.title: Add x-axis-aligned stacked linechart to Timeline View
payload.description: Render a stacked line/area chart above the compact activity rail so Daily, Weekly, Monthly, and Yearly timeline buckets can be compared on a shared x-axis with layer-colored event-volume bands.
acceptance: Chart uses the same filtered bucket model as the compact timeline rail
Daily/Weekly/Monthly/Yearly scale filters update the chart
Era and layer filters update the chart
Layer colors match timeline legend semantics
Chart includes x-axis labels, y-axis grid labels, legend, and peak bucket readouts
Responsive rules keep the chart inside the activity panel
Static validation and CLI smoke pass

payload.title: Design Character Profile and Lore Mining system
payload.description: Create a repeatable process to mine turns, skills, language, lore, relationships, agents, nodes, timeline, and protocols into appendable human-readable and agent-readable personality dossiers, using Calder/CJ/Hapa as the foundation example.
acceptance: Profile mining protocol document exists
Reusable mining prompt pack exists
JSON schema exists for generated dossiers
Calder foundation dossier exists as Markdown and JSON
Observation ledger is seeded with evidence-weighted cards
Node Space profile-mining flow sidecar exists
README, runtime docs, manifest, protocol flow, and projection contracts reference the new system
Projection refresh includes profile docs
Static validation and CLI smoke pass

payload.title: Add Character Profile section and run two-pass Calder profile mining
payload.description: Promote the Character Profile / Lore Mining protocol into the game-style Character Sheet UI, run a foundation fill pass for Calder, run a sharpened second pass from focused Second Brain queries, append new observation cards, and project the result into the browser data bundle.
acceptance: Profile route exists in Presentation mode
Profile data is projected into DATA.character_profile
Foundation run and sharpened run are represented in structured data
Sharpened Markdown dossier exists
Observation ledger includes second-pass cards
README, runtime docs, manifest, and projection contracts are updated
Static validation and CLI smoke pass

payload.title: Add Persona Codex background video cycle
payload.description: Cycle the two local Calder dramatic-intro clips behind the Persona Codex top card in the Profile presentation route while preserving the mined profile dossier content and generated data contract.
acceptance: Profile background loop assets are copied into outputs/assets with poster fallbacks
Projection exposes profile_background_videos with count and source metadata
Profile title card renders the videos as a muted autoplay background cycle
Reduced-motion users get a still fallback
README, runtime docs, manifest, and board state reference the media layer
Static validation, CLI smoke, and visual render check pass

payload.title: Make Persona Codex video backdrop visibly readable
payload.description: Strengthen the Profile hero video treatment by adding a poster-backed media plate, making the primary loop visible immediately, crossfading the secondary loop, and lightening the readability overlay so the video is visible behind Persona Codex.
acceptance: Persona Codex card includes a poster fallback layer
Primary video is visible by default instead of starting at opacity zero
Secondary video crossfades against the primary video
Reduced-motion state keeps a visible still plate
Static validation and CLI smoke pass

payload.title: Fix Persona Codex backdrop stacking selector
payload.description: Exclude the Profile video backdrop from the generic foreground child selector so its absolute positioning and z-index are not overwritten by the content-layer rule.
acceptance: The Profile backdrop keeps position:absolute and inset:0
Only non-backdrop Profile title children receive foreground z-index
Poster and video layer render behind Persona Codex copy
Static validation and CLI smoke pass

payload.title: Create standalone desktop version and launcher
payload.description: Harden the Electron shell into a standalone desktop surface, add a reusable launch script, Mac app bundle wrapper, Desktop command launcher, route menu, single-instance behavior, API health check, and Electron 42.3.3 runtime install.
acceptance: Electron shell opens the generated Character Sheet instead of the system browser
Launcher installs Electron dependencies on first run when needed
Desktop command launcher exists and is executable
Desktop app bundle wrapper exists and is linked on the Desktop
API starts only when health endpoint is not already running
Security defaults keep nodeIntegration off, contextIsolation on, and sandbox on
Docs, manifest, and board state reference the standalone desktop surface
Desktop smoke, npm audit, CLI smoke, and JSON validation pass
